mapper.sql: t.id, t.project_id, t.task_id, t.agent_company_id, t.agent_engineer_id, t.task_scope, t.deadline, t.status, t.submit_count, t.confirmed_by, t.confirmed_time, t.reject_reason, t.version, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, p.project_name, p.project_code, pt.task_name, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, ae.name AS agent_engineer_name, c.customer_name, p.contract_amount, p.cost_amount

LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = t.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_engineer ae ON ae.id = t.agent_engineer_id AND ae.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = p.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM outsource_task t
WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM outsource_task t
WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM outsource_task t
WHERE t.agent_company_id = #{agentCompanyId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
